description.ko: 정교한 기하학적 정밀함과 체계적 오류의 혼돈스러운 아름다움을 결합한 KURO-X의 디지털 정체성에 대한 시각적 탐구입니다. 이 컨셉은 구조적 안정성과 디지털 붕괴의 교차점을 나타냅니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of KURO-X's digital identity, blending rigid geometric precision with the chaotic beauty of systematic errors. This concept represents the intersection of structural stability and digital decay.

prompt: A futuristic and high-tech portrait of KURO-X featuring sharp geometric shapes, digital glitch artifacts, and pixel sorting. Minimalist dark aesthetic with vibrant neon chromatic aberration. High-tech fragmented polygons, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, digital distortion art style, black and white base with cyan and magenta accents.
